title: Buttery Dense Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A quick-fix Mediterranean dish featuring tender lamb, infused with buttery flavors and a hint of sugar, perfect for a halal-friendly meal. This recipe combines the richness of lamb with the brightness of Mediterranean spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together melted butter, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, paprika, salt, black pepper, and sugar.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or oregano, if desired.
